name: tripadvisor-mcp
description: TripAdvisor location search, details, photos, and reviews for Claude via the Terra API

tripadvisor_api_key.title: TripAdvisor Terra API Key
tripadvisor_api_key.description: Your TripAdvisor Terra API key (create one at tripadvisor.com/developers)

tools.name: ta_search_nearby
tools.description: Find TripAdvisor locations near a lat/long

tools.name: ta_get_location_details
tools.description: Get details for a location (rating, address, hours, amenities)

tools.name: ta_get_location_reviews
tools.description: Get the most recent reviews for a location

tools.name: ta_web_get_location
tools.description: Get a location's details from the public page via the browser bridge (no API key)
